channel.title: Tryhackme on jkt's blogs
channel.description: Recent content in Tryhackme on jkt's blogs

item.title: My Journey Through Cybersecurity: Degree, Certifications, and Hands-on Labs
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: Should you pursue a degree, stack certifications, or dive straight into practical experience? An honest breakdown from an aspiring offensive security professional.

item.title: RH124, RH134 & DO457 - Key Concepts, Learning Resources and Insights
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: Must-know resources and materials to get you started with Linux, System Administration, and security analysis.

item.title: TryHackMe Offensive PenTesting Pathway — Full Review
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A full breakdown of the TryHackMe Offensive PenTesting path — sections, deliverables, and practical tips.

item.title: TryHackMe Red Teaming Pathway — Full Review
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A full breakdown of the TryHackMe Red Teaming path — adversary simulation, evasion, Active Directory, and key takeaways.

item.title: TryHackMe CompTIA PenTest+ Pathway — Full Review
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A full breakdown of the TryHackMe CompTIA PenTest+ path — planning, tools, recon, and exploitation.
